subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in faith in God! Although the calamity of losing kith and kin, brother and child, friend and companion is grievous [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای موقن بالله هر چند مصیبت خویش و پیوند و برادر و فرزند و دوست و هوشمند سخت و
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @soul; spirit after death, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
